title: Semiconductor stocks plunge globally and drag down stock markets
summary: Broadcom, SanDisk and Teradyne lead the losses, while Japan's Nikkei falls more than 1,000 points due to the massive sell-off in tech stocks.

title: Tesla beats expectations with record quarterly deliveries
summary: The company reports 480,126 vehicles delivered in the second quarter, driven by the recovery of the European market and demand in China.

title: Lockheed Martin emerges as buyer of Ultra Maritime for $3.5 billion
summary: The American aerospace group leads negotiations to acquire the naval technology company from investment fund Advent.

title: Ibex 35 renews all-time highs and exceeds 19,700 points
summary: Spain's main stock index extends its bullish streak in a context of optimism over interest rates and macroeconomic data.

title: US job creation plummets in June, fueling rate cut bets
summary: Non-farm payrolls grew by only 57,000, well below expectations, reinforcing the possibility of a Fed cut.

title: Dow Jones hits new record at close of bullish week
summary: The US stock index rises 0.5% and marks an all-time high, while the S&P 500 remains flat and the Nasdaq falls.

title: Micron celebrates investor day with optimism about memory demand
summary: The chip company highlights growth driven by artificial intelligence and new technologies, raising sector outlook.

title: Biotech stocks rebound with Moderna and Universal Health leading
summary: The biotech sector experiences a strong rebound, with Moderna rising more than 8% and renewing investor interest.

title: Advances in the digital euro and digital finance in the European Union
summary: The ECB promotes the European digital currency while the ecosystem of stablecoins and digital financial integration in the eurozone grows.

title: Canada announces new oil pipeline to reduce energy dependence on the US
summary: The project seeks to diversify oil export markets and strengthen the country's energy security.

title: OpenAI considers IPO in 2027 with a $1 trillion valuation
summary: The artificial intelligence company founded by Sam Altman evaluates an IPO that could be one of the largest in history.

title: Meta claims its AI model already matches OpenAI, but admits delay in agents
summary: Mark Zuckerberg's company declares it has reached the level of OpenAI in language models, although progress in AI agents is slower than expected.

title: Tesla driver charged with manslaughter for accident in Texas
summary: The vehicle crashed into a home, and authorities filed charges against the driver after the investigation.

title: Blue Owl faces $4.7 billion in redemption requests due to investor exodus
summary: The alternative asset manager faces a persistent capital outflow that puts pressure on its funds.

title: UK court suspends car finance compensation plan
summary: The scheme to compensate consumers for undisclosed commissions is halted while the legality of the process is reviewed.

title: German tank manufacturer KNDS postpones its IPO due to market conditions
summary: The defense company's IPO, considered a disaster for the German government, is postponed until further notice.

title: SEC investigates alleged insider trading case linked to Chinese brokers
summary: The US stock market regulator examines suspicious transactions related to the crackdown on Chinese brokerage firms.

title: Argentina expresses outrage over oil boom in the Falkland Islands
summary: The Argentine government protests plans for hydrocarbon exploitation in the archipelago disputed with the United Kingdom.

title: Major retailer abandons fashion business in US after multimillion-dollar scandal
summary: The company decides to withdraw from the US fashion market after a fraud involving millions of dollars.

title: Forvis Mazars fined £600,000 for widespread deficiencies in its audits
summary: The British accounting regulator sanctions the firm for systematic failures in its audit work.
